params.name: Hittite Laws
params.description:
On Oct 25, 1576, BC, the first edition of the Hittite Laws was compiled.
As one of the most important documents in Hittite history, it was compiled during the period of the Hittite kingdom, and its provisions cover many aspects of the economy and daily life. Compared with the Code of Hammurabi, the punishments are relatively light, and the use of the death penalty is limited to a few occasions and can be replaced by fines or pardoned by the king. Most crimes are handled through civil compensa …
